content: User asked who was the first wrestler to successfully cash in a Money in the Bank contract.

relation.subject: user
relation.object: first wrestler to cash in Money in the Bank contract

evidence_span: Who was the first wrestler to successfully cash in a Money in the Bank contract?
assistant_replies: The first wrestler to successfully cash in a Money in the Bank contract was Edge in 2006.

content: User stated that Edge was one of their favorite wrestlers back then and asked who has cashed in the most Money in the Bank contracts so far.
evidence_span: Edge was one of my favorite wrestlers back then.
assistant_replies: The wrestler who has cashed in the most Money in the Bank contracts so far is Carmella. She has cashed in her contract twice, once in 2018 to win the SmackDown Women's Championship and once in 2020 to win the 24/7 Championship. Other wrestlers who have cashed in their contracts more than once include Edge, CM Punk, and Seth Rollins, who have all had successful cash-ins twice.

content: User remembered when Carmella won the SmackDown Women's Championship with her Money in the Bank cash-in.

relation.subject: user
relation.object: Carmella winning SmackDown Women's Championship via cash-in

evidence_span: I remember when Carmella won the SmackDown Women's Championship with her cash-in.
assistant_replies: Yes, it definitely was a huge moment for Carmella, as well as for the history of Money in the Bank cash-ins. She became the first woman to successfully cash in the contract, and it was a significant moment for women's wrestling in WWE.

content: User remembered when Seth Rollins cashed in his Money in the Bank contract during the main event of WrestleMania 31 and won the WWE World Heavyweight Championship.

relation.subject: user
relation.object: Seth Rollins cashing in at WrestleMania 31 and winning WWE World Heavyweight Championship

evidence_span: I also remember when Seth Rollins cashed in his Money in the Bank contract during the main event of WrestleMania 31.
assistant_replies: Yes, that was a memorable moment for sure! Seth Rollins' cash-in was one of the most dramatic and surprising cash-ins in Money in the Bank history. After the main event match between Brock Lesnar and Roman Reigns, Rollins' music hit and he ran down to the ring with his Money in the Bank briefcase. He cashed it in mid-match, turning the singles match into a triple threat match, and eventually won the WWE World Heavyweight Championship, making it his first world championship reign in WWE.

content: User commented that the WrestleMania moment was insane and solidified Seth Rollins's place as a top superstar in WWE.
evidence_span: Yeah, that WrestleMania moment was insane! I never saw it coming, and it really solidified Seth's place as a top superstar in WWE.
assistant_replies: Definitely, Seth Rollins' cash-in at WrestleMania 31 was a game-changing moment for his career and really helped establish him as a top superstar in the company. It was a perfect example of how the Money in the Bank contract can be a game-changer for a wrestler's career and can make a huge impact on the outcome of a match or even an entire pay-per-view event.
